consensus_score.reasoning: GPT-4o detected task completion with tail cut at 35 seconds, while Claude reported incomplete task at 180 seconds. GPT's detection of the tail_cut phase and successful completion is accepted as it provides specific completion criteria that Claude missed. The task was completed successfully within the time limit.

disagreements.rationale: GPT detected the tail_cut phase which is the required completion step, while Claude missed this completion event and defaulted to maximum time

claude_value.description: Task not completed within maximum time of 180 seconds. Loop tail was not cut inside the trainer.

disagreements.rationale: GPT's detection of the tail_cut phase indicates task completion occurred, contradicting Claude's incomplete_task assessment

disagreements.resolution: Used GPT value including tail_cut phase
disagreements.rationale: The tail_cut phase is the definitive completion marker for this task, and GPT's detection of this phase is consistent with successful task completion
